sglang.title: [ROCm] Use `tl.range()` in block GEMM kernels with `num_stages` set by host.
sglang.author: whchung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Modifications
Use tl.range() in block GEMM kernels with num_stages set by host to hint Triton produce better software pipelining.

sglang.title: Benchmark for reasoning models
sglang.author: simveit
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
To evaluate reasoning models it makes sense to use difficult questions. This benchmark intends to use evaluate on the LIMO dataset.
The Qwen 1.5B distill archives 47% accuracy PASS@1.
Modifications
A script to benchmark on LIMO.
Checklist

sglang.title: [docker] added rdma support
sglang.author: FrankLeeeee
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The existing Docker does not support RDMA, which makes it insufficient to run cross-node servers such as DeepSeek V3. This PR added the support for RDMA with testing and documentation.
Modifications
Installed RDMA libs in docker and adjusted the necessary docker flags. I conducted several

vllm.title: [BugFix] Enhance test_pos_encoding to support execution on multi-devices
vllm.author: wchen61
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
"The test case in test_pos_encoding.py frequently fails when run in a multi-device environment.
FAILED test_pos_encoding.py::test_rotary_embedding[cuda:1-0-dtype0-32-120-17-8192-5-False] - RuntimeError: Expected all tensors to be on the same device, but found at least two devices, cuda:0 and cuda:1!

vllm.title: [V1] Update doc and examples for H2O-VL
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Update the doc to reflect that H2O-VL is actually supported on V1 with a note regarding the 2B version. I've verified h2oai/h2ovl-mississippi-800m works on V1 and actually has more downloads & likes on HF than h2oai/h2ovl-mississippi-2b

vllm.title: [ci] skip failed tests for flashinfer
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
as observed in https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/13529#01950982-09cb-4aef-8f57-c8228d304aad , new flashinfer version fails the fp8 accuracy test. before it is fixed, let's skip the test for now.
NOTE: we still need flashinfer 0.2.1.post1 for MLA integration. so i'm not reverting #13323

vllm.title: [platform] add base class for communicators
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To support out-of-tree platforms, we need to abstract the communicators, so that out-of-tree platforms can implement their own communicator and hook into vllm's code.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix 2 Node and Spec Decode tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix 2-Node test OOM failure in distributed/test_pipeline_parallel.py::test_tp_language_generation[microsoft/Phi-3.5-MoE-instruct-parallel_setup18-ray-0-auto-test_option
Fix Spec Decode failure in spec_decode/e2e/test_ngram_correctness.py::test_ngram_e2e_greedy_correctness[1--1-1-256-test_llm_kwargs0

vllm.title: [Docs] Change myenv to vllm. Update python_env_setup.inc.md
vllm.author: arkylin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Change myenv to vllm. A better version of the tutorial.

vllm.title: [V1][PP] Cache Intermediate Tensors
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If I understand correctly, we should cache the intermediate tensors and reuse them for CUDA graphs. This could be another reason why current PP is not working correctly.
cc @comaniac @youkaichao

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Platform][CPU] Fix cuda platform detection on CPU backend edge case
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There is an edge case bug for cuda platform activation about CPU backend after #12963.


If vllm cpu backend is built on a GPU machine, cpu platform and gpu platform will be activated at the same time:


RuntimeError: Only one platform plugin can be activated, but got: ['cpu', 'cuda']

vllm.title: [V1][BugFix] Clean up rejection sampler & Fix warning msg
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes a few issues in the rejection sampler:

It prints the warning/logging message for every forward call
It does not check the VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER env variable, which allows users to turn off flashinfer.

vllm.title: [V1][Misc] Avoid unnecessary log output
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When I test the llama model using V1, it outputs the following information, which I believe should only appear for multimodal models
WARNING 02-14 12:07:01 registry.py:340] `mm_limits` has already been set for model=/root/model/lama/Llama-2-7B-fp16-hf, and will be overwritten by the new values.
